overview: Professional website for PrimeSpan Engineering Ltd — a specialized engineering consulting firm. Features a content hub model with filterable case studies, service detail pages with technical methodology, and a lead capture contact form designed for high-intent technical buyers.
features: Homepage with hero, services overview, featured case studies, and trust signals
Services hub with 3 detailed service pages showing methodology, standards, and tools
Filterable portfolio of case studies by industry and material type
Full case study detail pages with challenge, approach, and outcome metrics
About page with certifications and team credentials
4-field contact form with backend submission storage
Sticky header with Request Technical Quote CTA
Dark industrial design with mobile-responsive layout
